headline: Is Datadog (DDOG) Fully Priced As Earnings Expectations Build?
summary: Upcoming Earnings Put Datadog in Focus Datadog (DDOG) is back on investors’ radar ahead of its August 6, 2026 earnings report, with the market watching forecasts for EPS and revenue growth and weighing those expectations against the stock’s recent volatility. See our latest analysis for Datadog. The recent 1 day share price decline of 3.2% to US$254.79 comes after a strong 90 day share price return of 92.82% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 75.85%. This suggests momentum has been...

headline: Arrakis Comes out of Stealth With $38M to Help Industrial Enterprises Compete in the AI Era
summary: LONDON, July 22, 2026--Arrakis, the AI deployment company helping industrial companies install AI agents for mission-critical operations, today announced a $30 million Series A led by Blossom Capital, with participation from existing investor Accel, which also led the company's $7.5 million seed round.
